---
title: "About"
output: html_document
---

Hi everyone.

I am Nick Anderson, a PhD candidate in Economics at The New School for Social Research. This is a website where I host my projects and anything else I want to share publicly.

Best wishes,

Nick

---

[nickawebbox@gmail.com](mailto:nickawebbox@gmail.com) · [github.com/andenick](https://github.com/andenick)

<style type="text/css">
.navbar-default {
    background-color: #640000 !important;
}
.navbar .navbar-brand, .navbar .navbar-nav .nav-links  {
  color: white;
}
.navbar-default .navbar-nav>li>a {
    color: white !important;
    font-weight: 150;
}
.navbar-nav > .active > a {
    background-color: #006400 !important;
    font-weight: 175;
}
</style>
